scripts.dev: bun build ./index.html --outdir ./dist --watch & bun run copy-assets --watch & bun server.js
scripts.copy-assets: mkdir -p dist/assets && cp -r assets/* dist/assets/ 2>/dev/null || true && mkdir -p dist/assets/cm-chessboard && cp -r node_modules/cm-chessboard/assets/* dist/assets/cm-chessboard/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r public/* dist/ 2>/dev/null || true
